options.name: -dynamic_view
options.description: Specifies the analysis_view for dynamic power analysis

options.name: -hold_views
options.description: Specifies the hold views for loading

options.name: -leakage_view
options.description: Specifies the analysis_view for leakage power analysis

options.name: -lef_files
options.description: Specifies LEF files for loading if want to override the existing LEF files in the design being restored and load different LEF files instead

options.name: -mmmcFile
options.description: Specifies the path name to a viewDefinition.tcl (MMMC) file

options.name: -noBinaryConstraint
options.description: Specify not to load binary timing constraint .tcz file even it's saved to disk in previous session.

options.name: -noTiming
options.description: Disables reading timing libraries and constraints during the restore design process

options.name: -noTimingGraph
options.description: Specifies not to load timing graph even it's saved to disk in previous session

options.name: -readGlobals
options.description: Specifies the UDM variables to be honored when restoring the design. User should provide a tcl file stating the pre-defined UDM variable names to be honored.

options.name: -setup_views
options.description: Specifies the setup views for loading
